---
title: "Mapcode"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-01"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Sandprawn distribution and protection level

Creating an interactive map of *Kraussillichirus kraussi* observations in South Africa colour coded by ecosystem protection level.

Reading in coastal protection data.

```{r}
install.packages("sf")
library(sf)
```

Reading in the data from iNaturalist.

```{r}
library(rinat)
sp <- get_inat_obs(taxon_name = "Kraussillichirus kraussi", bounds = c(-35, 17.5, -26.8, 33), maxresults = 1000)
head(sp)
```

Filtering the results for research grade observations and positional accuracy.

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
sp <- sp %>% filter(positional_accuracy<46 & latitude<0 & !is.na(latitude) & quality_grade == "research")

```
